review_text:
We originally booked in February, but due to personal circumstances we had to rebook our trip to May. The staff kindly and happily changed our booking for us.

We arrived at the caravan park around 4:30 pm and were able to check in straight away. The staff member who welcomed us was very friendly and helpful.

Although the campground itself was relatively tinyl, it was extremely well maintained. We stayed for two nights on a tent site and had a wonderful time. The bathrooms and showers were spotless, and we made great use of the camp kitchen and facilities including the oven, fridge, and cooktop.

There was also a pizza oven, but unfortunately we didn’t know about it beforehand so we missed the chance to make pizza! If we visit again, we would definitely love to try it.

The fire pit was shared by guests, and the staff lit the fire every evening, which created a lovely atmosphere.

The location was also great — most major wineries were only about a 15-minute drive away. On our second morning, we visited a nearby winery at sunrise and were able to watch the air balloons taking off while seeing lots of kangaroos nearby.

We highly recommend this place to anyone looking for a quiet and relaxing camping experience.

And finally, thank you to the staff member who recommended wineries to us — we really appreciated it!

We stayed for a couple of nights and were warmly welcomed from the moment we arrived. The location is fantastic, the amenities were spotless and had everything we needed for a comfortable stay. It’s a great place to relax and enjoy the region. We’ll definitely be back next time we’re in the area.
Lovely camp site, clean and great amenities. Kylie is super friendly and accommodating.

This was the BEST!!  A tiny, quiet camping ground, SO close to great wineries, with clean amenities and a fabulous camp kitchen, including a wood fired pizza oven and outside fire pit.  We used both the latter, and the owners even got the pizza oven fired up for us.  Loved our stay on their grassy sites!

This was the BEST!!  Close to great wineries, quiet, lovely grassy sites, very clean amenities and a fabulous camp kitchen with a wood fired pizza oven, which the owners fired up beforehand for us.  The fire pit outside was perfect to sample our pizza and 🍷.  Highly recommend!

We stay at this park regularly |It’s amenities are clean & tidy |Great location close to clubs pubs & wineries |We actually did the Zoo this trip|Sites are good size |Definitely will be back for a great weekend
The showers have curtains that go to the floor and stop your stuff getting wet. Interesting plumbing on the urinal cistern. Could make some plumbers heads spin🙂

We stayed three nights at this small well kept and clean family owned caravan park. The sites are well marked and of generous size and there is a great camp kitchen and fire pit. The park is close to the wineries and over the road from the brewery. Thank you to Kylie and the team for a relaxing stay.

This was perfect for our event ,which met all our needs staying in our caravan. Very friendly staff and very clean , tidy park and central to everything making things easy. Highly recommend thanks for a great stay.
Cabin was cosy and warm.Only problem was that you didn't have a little oven or cook top.

What can I say, this park has fantastic managers and it is very well kept. The park is dog friendly and has spacious site. The park is a short drive to town and to the multitude of wineries. I would definitely stay here again.

We enjoyed our stay at this park and liked the fact that it was small and personal. The amenities are old but very clean and the park is in a great location to see all of the Hunter has to offer. Will stay there again.
Luke and Kylie were amazing, well managed property and heaps of good fun in the area.
Small van park with lovely,  helpful staff.  Has everything you need. We'd definitely stay there again.

We stayed at Wine Country Caravan Park mid week on a powered site. Nice big sites, concrete slabs to many, good location for wineries, good rates, clean but dated amenities and friendly service. Busy road noise, but only during the day. Well worth a try.

Stayed in the park with a van, 3rd visit and very happy with the park manager, Kylie, always helpful and accommodation. Easy 5 min drive to the vineyards, a great location to stay to do the rounds of the Hunter Valley.
Clean and quiet small small park beautiful fire pit and wood fired pizza oven! Walking distance to the brewery easy access to all of the area

Such a cute little campsite. |Lovely staff, great facilities and a short uber away from any of the wineries. |We did Bimbadgen from here in 10 mins which was lovely for wine tasting and dinner. |Lovely spacing between pitches here too!

Shoestring sized sites, old amenities and no rubbish bins except the dumpsters down the back and no bottle recycling. Dump point is primitive using a pot lid as a cover and all in all not a pleasant stay however the location was good.
Great park, well maintained and friendly managers.  Good location to wineries in HV and also to the cellar doors near O’Connors road.
Lovely caravan park and staff were very helpful.  Clean and tidy ammenities block.   Close to wineries and Cessnock.  Walking distance to Pie Shop and The Valley Brewhouse.
Great little park, excellent location
Nice park. Will stay again. Good location.
Nice little park. Will stay again.

Another lovely stay.  Such a warm friendly park, the owners are always very hospitable and easy going.
Everything is there so makes life so simple to camp.
Will see you all soon!
We stayed on a powered site overnight. Very happy with the park and the people. Definately on our list to stay again if we return to Cessnock.
We had a camping site. Nice little Camping Ground.
Clean, tidy and comfortable. Enough room for a family of 5. Great location. Friendly service.

Stayed for 2 weeks and it was awsome! Big shout out to Kylie, Jade and the big fella who did maintenance and grounds keeping ( sorry, didn't catch his name). They know the definition of hospitality. Open, warm, welcoming and nothing was a hassle. The place just has a really good vibe about it...and there's about 150 wineries and cellar doors just up the road. |Cheers 🥂

Stayed in a motorhome and it was brilliant. It's pretty endearing to see the staff genuinely care about what they're doing, the place has a really good vibe about it. Shout out to Kylie and Jade for their hospitality. Ohh yeah...there's also about 150 wineries and cellar doors just up the road. I look forward to becoming a repeat offender😁 Cheers🥂
This really is close to everything  - wineries, breweries, distilleries, cheese and chocolate and also great golf courses. Great amenities, lovely hosts. Only 10mins to Cessnock

We recently stayed at this lovely caravan Park and really enjoyed it. It's a small, personal park which gives it a relaxed and welcoming feel. The amenities were spotless and well maintained. The barbecue area was excellent and had everything you needed, all kept clean. We would definitely stay again and highly recommend it to anyone visiting the area.

Have stayed here several times when visiting the region. Very well kept clean and tidy with great facilities which are soon to be upgraded and reasonably priced. Friendly reception and help. Relax by the pool on a hot day after visiting the regions attractions. Easy direct access via O"Connors Road to the fabulous wineries. Highly recommended
Disappointing.|For all the shady spots available we were given a stinking hot one. |Not on my repeat visit list.
Booked into the park for 3 nights and enjoyed our stay, conveniently located to the Hunter valley Wineries.
Great little park with a friendly and helpful team working it. Amenities a little dated however very clean and tidy.

Super freundlicher Empfang. |Die sanitären Anlagen waren sauber, allerdings könnten die eine Renovierung vertragen. |Toll war, dass in den Duschen Shampoo, Deo oder Duschgel zur Verfügung gestellt wurde.|Der Platz war ausreichend groß und es gab Strom- auch wenn der nächstgelegene Stromkasten kaputt war. Unser Kabel reichte aber an den nächsten Kasten.|Der Platz liegt ganz gut und man kann von dort aus ein paar Weingüter erreichen.
We really enjoyed our stay here at Wine Country Tourist Park. Friendly owners that make you feel welcome.

What an amazing caravan park. Reception staff so helpful and friendly. Ammenities clean and accessible.|A great place to stay so close to the wineries.|Best pie shop outside of park.|Fabulous stay. We will be back.
We had an amazing time relaxing at the caravan park. And omg the staff were amazing. We will definitely be back.
Lovely little caravan park with everything you need including a pool
We had an amazing stay the park was very clean and tidy. The staff were amazing we will definitely back. The pool was amazing and the amenities were clean.

Nice shady small park at a reasonable price. However there are a few negatives. It is bounded by very busy roads (constant cars, trucks, buses) and next to a school with kids screaming before school starts, on their breaks, and after school. The school also has a very loud megaphone announcing all sorts of random things at random times. Not what you would call a serene caravan park!
The amenities are old. Broken paving, crumbling walls, ratty sheds, tiny dump point with a glass saucepan lid for a cover (took as a while to find it, it's hidden in the bushes next to the amenities block). Showers very retro, more shabby than cute, and why o why don't they have even 1 hook to hang your things on? They were being cleaned so we had to use the disabled shower - it has no wall hooks, shelf, or even a chair, so I put my things on the bin, awkward and not very higenic. There is no shower curtain so of course water goes everywhere. And then there are multiple signs wanting us to clean the floors and not use the shower for more than 5 mins as it's a drought? I'm sorry but we are paying good money to stay here, and we have to mop the floors! And as for the so called water restrictions, we watched a staff member use a water blaster for over half an hour to clean some paving, a bucket and a sponge would have been much more water wise.
Friendly helpful service on the phone.
Had a wonderful stay. The team.was so friendly and the park was great, so close to the wineries :)

We booked on the same day due to change in our itinerary. Very easy online booking and the most affordable prices in the area! Straight forward check in, easy independent checkout. Personnel is available. The campground has more than one may need (fully equipped kitchen, bbq, fire pit, pizza oven) cleaned bathroom with hot showers and a pool! Beautiful and peaceful. We stayed in with a Campervan so I cannot talk about the rooms but I would bet they are on par with the rest.
Thank you for having us :)
It's a great little caravan park.
Amazing caravan park, the staff were very friendly and professional. Best choice if you want a great place to relax and chill by the pool. Highly recommended 👌

Good location for doing a wine tour! Clean bathrooms. Pleasant vibe.

Small camp spot meaning our tent ladder almost touched the car next to us, even with our car right against the hedge on the other side. Noisy busy kitchen as it seems a place people working on the roads were staying. Power didn’t seem to work in our spot either. Pricey at nearly $60 for the above.
A lovely friendly campsite in the Hunter Valley. Selina was super helpful getting us set up on our site and giving us information on local wineries and places to eat.

Kylie was very friendly and helpful and the park was in a perfect location for our short stay.
Would definitely recommend.

I always have a great experience staying at Wine Country Tourist Park. Nothing ever seems to be a problem for Kylie. The pool was very appreciated this last week and I meet some great  international travellers in the camp kitchen.

Great little park which is very close to all the wineries and tourist destinations.
A great few days spent.
Dave Dicks

What a great little gem. Lovely quiet little park and so close to so many wineries and town. Great pie shop next door.,The amenities are really clean and the pool is perfect to cool off in on a hot afternoon. Thanks Kylie and Selena for your friendliness and great winery and delicious limoncello  recommendations just up the road from the park. A great place to stop over in or a bit longer stay.
Very happy to stay there again. Good service, and location close to everything. Reasonable rates.
Good stop over if wish to visit wineries. Friendly and helpful staff, caravan amenities are run down and need attention.
Cramped sites and a cold-water-only laundry. Not ideal if you need to do a proper wash like bedding; you'll have to head off-site for that.

Excellent little family owned park! The manager was very welcoming and friendly, and the amenities were pristine. Gardens were lovely, and the sites are level slabs. We had been weighing up going to the Ingenia park, but we are so very glad we didn’t! Thank you so much for our stay, we will be back!

Great caravan park to stay at. Last stayed there 20 years ago, had an enjoyable time there then, so naturally, went back. No different... great. Cheery reception, clean amenities, nothing too much bother. i'd highly recommend them.

Beautiful caravan park in the heart of the Hunter. Conveniently located close to the wineries. Stayed here for two nights in a pet friendly cabin with my partner and our dog. Easy after hours check in, comfortable accommodation and lovely service. Wish we could have stayed longer.

We had an enjoyable stay over Christmas while visiting family. Close to Hunter vineyards, cesnock and within driving distance of Newcastle.
The facilities were clean and showers were hot. The sites were well grassed and level.
Office staff were pleasant and informative.
A great place to stay. Nice quiet tidy park very close to wineries.

Kylie the manager was so welcoming, even when booking on the phone. She was full of info about the area and told us about some lovely cellar doors to visit. We had the site next to the camp kitchen, which was well equipped and clean, but that was ok, as my dog would watch everyone when BBQing and that got us chatting to people and occasionally she was lucky to get a snag 😜. Amenities are old but always clean. We didn’t use the pool, too busy drinking wine 🍷 😂, but it looked clean and inviting. Great location too. There was nothing we didn’t like about this CP and would definitely recommend it.
Staff were very welcoming and friendly.  Park and amenities were very clean and tidy. Best camp kitchen I've ever seen

Visited over the summer period and thought we'd chance our luck to see if there was any last minute availability to stay. Really lovely and helpful staff, very close to some great vineyards and pubs/restaurants (walking distance for some of the vineyards). Great and clean facilities, and overall safe and relaxed atmosphere. Definitely worth a visit!

Perfekt för oss som ett första stopp efter avresa från Sydney. Mycket lugnt och lagomt stor camping. All funktionalitet med vatten och el funkade perfekt till vår Campingvan. Vi stannade här två dygn och han då med besök på några vingårdar och en promenad bort till bryggeriet.

Petit camping familiale avec le nécessaire ainsi que des commerces à 2km
Propre et conviviale, parfait avec notre camping car et nos deux bébés

Nice little park with convenient location and friendly people ☺️ common areas were kept clean and tidy, and got a lot of space for as to share😆enjoyed my two nights stay there, and will definitely come back again !

We’ve been here before but Kylee the manager and her hubby are the best ! They just can’t do enough and do so with a smile on their face!

The park is well kept, the shower and toilet facilities whiled dated , are super clean . It’s a lovely spot !

Put on a site next to main road. Bathrooms don't look clean or looked after. Terrible service.
Asked to be moved as site is not appropriate for young children n told to leave.
Worst caravan site I have stayed in n will never be back.

Fantastic place to stay!
Staff are wonderful and so friendly.
Incredibly dog friendly, walking distance to a pub and close to the wineries.
Would definitely book again

Great Park with very peaceful surrounding. We stayed in the family cabin, which is new and was very clean and spacious. Great location, close to winery, Cessnock and Brewery. Everything was perfect and just what we wanted. The staff are friendly and well organised. I will stay again, next time i visit the Hunter Region
Hey, its was a very nice stay, thanks a lot. 👌

Een heerlijk rustige camping met grote plekken en genoeg privacy. Er is een grote camp kitchen en de faciliteiten zijn schoon. Ook is er een klein zwembad voor de nodige verkoeling. Verder is het makkelijk om in de buurt een wijn proeverij te doen. Een aanrader! Hou je niet van wijn dan kun je aan de overkant bij de bierbrouwerij terecht.

Erg vriendelijk ontvangen aan de balie, maar dat was wel het meest positieve aan deze campground. Met 40 graden aankomen en zien dat er nauwelijks bomen zijn, en daarmee geen schaduw te vinden op het park wat het kamperen niet echt prettig maakte. Het zwembadje is een groot voordeel, maar wat was het vies! Net als de keuken. Overvolle prullenbakken, niet werkende kookplaatjes, alles wat je beetpakte plakte. De douches en keuken kunnen wel een flinke renovatiebeurt gebruiken, je krijgt het idee dat de eigenaar er niet zo om geeft. De sfeer was verder erg fijn en relaxt.
Fijne uitvalsbasis voor de wijngaarden. Niet heel nieuw, maar ik wil ze prijzen voor de persoonlijke service. Alles is er; zwembad, laundry, toiletgebouw en de prijs is echt heel schappelijk.

Perfect.

From the time we arrived we were welcomed warmly and showed out site.
The campsite is located slap bang between Cessnock (10mins) and the first wineries.
There is a great pastries and coffee shop and also a brewery within easy walk.
The amenities are dated but we're always clean and so fresh smelling! I like showering in the 80s.
The pool was clean, the camp kitchen clean
There was also a communal camp fire and pizza oven. But there was a fire ban
The downsides, the school bell! The rubbish around the back of the amenities block was like a scrap yard. But that's it. I would definitely recommend and would definitely stay there again!!

Nice Caravan park. Potters Tavern 200mtrs down the road. Pie shop on the corner. It is on the main road and was noisy during the day but quiet at night. Nice amenities. Pool wasn't sparkling clean but was still good on those hot hot days.
Loved our stay and will definitely stay again.

Great little park in a perfect spot to explore the local vineyards and town. Close to cafes, restaurants and great public transport options. Staff were very welcoming and the cabin was cosy and had everything we needed. Highly recommended!

This is a truly fantastic park with everything you need.
The staff are friendly and accommodating, the park itself is kept immaculately and the whole stay is enjoyable from check in to check out.
Great park  , friendly staff and very well priced
Friendly staff, clean rooms and affordable stays
Just loved the hospitality and a lovely little spot would stay there again thanks

The Wine Country Tourist Park Hunter Valley, is a great little caravan park with all the essentials for older and younger travellers. The staff were very helpful and friendly, the location is central to many venues within the Hunter Valley region. Good clean amenities, nice pool and good size camp kitchen. We had a group of 26 people and we were looked after very well.
Highly recommended.
Excellent, Clean, great location.

Wine Country Tourist Park – A Hidden Gem!
This charming park offers a fantastic atmosphere and is staffed by an absolutely wonderful team. Conveniently located close to everything you need – especially the vineyards – it’s the perfect spot for a relaxing getaway.

I’ve been a regular visitor for the many  years and can’t recommend it highly enough. One of the things I love most is the friendly community vibe; you’ll always meet great people and make lasting friendships here.

The price is just right, so why not pay them a visit? You won’t be disappointed!

Excellent service - Park manager really puts in the effort to make guests feel welcomed and comfortable. Good quiet location and many shaded sites. Amenities well kept, although would benefit from a little renovation- perhaps new shower heads. Overall a great place to stay.
Die Waschraum müssten dringend erneuert werden.

Fantastic little park. Perfectly located just outside Cessnock and across the road from Potters Brewery. We stayed here with friends for the Jimmy Barnes concert at Bimbadgen and had the best time. Amenities were spotless and a great pool to cool off on a 40°+++ day. Also a lovely little pie shop next door with good coffee & delicious pies & cakes. Kylie is a fabulous host and so welcoming. Highly recommend to anyone travelling to the Hunter Valley and we will definitely be back.

A great place to stay, the amenities were outstanding best equipped camp kitchen we have come across. The hosts were so welcoming and eager to assist with anything we requested. We will definitely be back.
we stayed at the park in a caravan and it was fantastic great service and everything was clean and tidy  thank you so much
Great amenities, camp kitchen was well stocked with everything you’d need and everything you forgot to bring and really comfortable. Kylie was super friendly and helpful.

Didn’t use a room as we had our own on wheels, but a great place to stay for the Jimmy Barnes gig. It was a stinkin hot weekend and you couldn’t get a better touch than complimentary ice blocks doing the rounds & the pool a focal point of the park. Well done WCTP, we’ll be back for the next Day on the green!

Fantastic caravan park, very friendly and helpful hosts. Great spot for wineries,pub up the road, best pie shop eva and 10 mins from concert venues. Pool was very clean with pool noodles lovely and cold for 39 degree heat.
Great little caravan park. Clean amenities lovely staff & so close to all the wineries.
Very clean and friendly staff! Thanks Kylie!
We booked a powered site for 2 nights. Great location &  friendly owners.

This is a hidden secret and a place we will return to every year at least. Lovely pool, 2 mins to Piehole for coffee first thing in the morning. Really helpful staff who go above and beyond. We loved it. Walk to Cessnock. Dog friendly. So close to wineries. Small and very comfortable. Loved it

We thoroughly enjoyed our stay in a cabin.  It is lovely caravan park with great facilities.  The cabin was clean, comfy and great air conditioning.  We will be back to stay with our caravan for sure.

Prima plekken met voorzieningen echter niet op alle plaatsen afvoer. Inchecken ging snel.
Plaatsen hebben niet veel schaduw.
In de douches mogen wel antislip matten omdat de tegels glad zijn bij nattigheid.
Heerlijk dat er 3 windmolens zijn om de was op te hangen. Wasmachines zowel warm als koud voor 5$, is prima. Jammer dat de wifi niet werkt.
Hubby done a BBQ & beer tasting course
Location is perfect, seamless booking process, lovely staff and really affordable rates. We have a caravan and booked a powered site for two nights. Highly recommend!
War mit dem Campervan dort. Sehr gepflegt und sauber. Sehr freundlich. In der nähe befindet sich Potters Brewery, dort ist am Wochenend Live Musik, man kann dort essen und trinken.

Powered site. Centrally located.
Great access to wine region, Cessnock, Valley Pub and Brewery across Road 👍👍

We had a van site which was easy to get in and out , the site was clean and with great location for us . Recommend everyone to stay there if visiting the Hunter Valley winery's as it's nice and close . Thankyou

Loved our stay here! Refurbished cabin with everything we need in a quiet street off the main road. Very well located to wineries and walkable to some food spots too. The value you get for the price is great - would highly recommend staying here.
Camping right next to a busy road, even at night. We stayed here for two nights (site 42) and I barely slept, even with earplugs. Otherwise, a fine campsite. Friendly staff.
Great van park. Very well located for the wine region. Friendly and extremely clean.
We rented a site here and it was great. Showers and location was great. Such a reasonable price for the site. So close to the wineries. We will definitely be back.

Stayed in studio cabin, well appointed, clean tidy and had all the basics.  Great communal kitchen, bbq with plenty of comfy seats and tables.  Kitchen had all you would need to cook up a meal, heat up good basic stores of oil, condiments too. A woodfired pizza oven and great fire pit.  Will definitely stay again.  Close to Potters Brewery and wineries, and also to the local shops -great central location
Leuk en net tourist park. Goede locatie voor bezoek aan Hunter Valley, de vele mooie wijngaarden. Per fiets (elektrisch) erg leuk en mooi.
Great location, close to wineries 🍷,  quiet park .fair price

What a great family owned caravan park. It has everything you could need for a comfortable and enjoyable stay. The grounds are well kept, there is a great camp kitchen and a nice pool to cool down in. The owners are welcoming and helpful and the facilities are all very clean and tidy and  great value. I recommend staying here.
Great spot, close to winery ,kyle was amazing helping us with directions to a wedding we were going too.
Thank you for hosting our family on our lap. The kids had a great time in the pool and eating strawberries. Thank you for your hospitality.
Lovely friendly caravan park run by a beautiful lady named Kylie , who is very helpful with any info. Often stay there in our van and little dog.
Amazing place, good price and well maintained amenities
Gorgeous little caravan park. We stayed in one of the cabins which was clean and presented well. I would highly recommend to anyone looking for a quiet and well maintained park to stay in.
What a great couple of nights- Staff were more than accommodating & friendly. Will be back in the near future for any reason!

We had a completely wonderful stay, living in our camper with electricity and water available at the site. Very clean in the common areas. Incredibly friendly owners who are extremely service-oriented. We took an Uber to wine tasting (5 min drive) one day and drove to a small zoo (also five minutes away) the next day. Top location! Highly recommended!
Lovely,friendly small Van Park. Great camp kitchen. The "emergency" toiletry supply in the amenities was a lovely touch.
Kleiner Park, Stellplatz direkt neben der gut ausgestatteten Campingküche bekommen.  Nachts sehr ruhig, alles gut gepflegt.
Great location, great campsite, amazing service! Couldn’t recommend enough!
Great park, clean, tidy and friendly staff. Would recommend
Quiet, friendly, clean.
Beautiful caravan park. Very friendly and helpful staff. Great location.

What a truly excellent tourist park. We stayed 2 nights in a camping powered site while doing some wine tasting which is a very short trip away.

Flat perfect size plot, camp kitchen has everything and more you could ever need. Stove, microwave, little oven, big fridge, washing area, tv, lounges, dining tables, bbq’s…. Seriously, it was so impressive.

Pool is kept clean and great for a dip to cool down.

Bathroom’s are so clean and surprising. If you’re a camper, you know how many park bathroom facilities are rubbish. This is the opposite, so inviting and comforting all day round.

Kylie is just a delight to deal with and super friendly.

We will be back next time for sure.

We stayed in our Motorhome in this lovely caravan park. Had to score the rooms but we didn't stay in one. Lovely hosts and when you book HV wine tours they pick you up and drop off at doorstep. If you like walking it's a 8km return walk into Cessnock. Thanks team.

Very well maintained park. Management were very co-operative and helpful when they realised they had misinterpreted the Suzi of my motorhome and trailer. They put us on a much larger (grass) site next to the well equipped Camp Kitchen. Also gave me a key to the Disabled Amenities due to my infirmities.

We have just left from our 2 night stay as we were in the Hunter for a wedding, from the moment we drove in the gate we were welcomed by the most lovely team, they were helpful and just down to earth people! The sites are awesome, amenities well maintained, pool looked inviting but didnt get a chance to use it. It wouldnt even be a question for us staying again if we return to the area. Thanks guys 👏

We highly recommend this family owned and operated park which has very friendly staff, clean amenities, a well equipped camp kitchen, a communal fire pit and beautifully kept grounds all at a minimal cost. It's close to the wineries, has a bakery next door and a pub just down the road.

A nice family-run, budget-friendly option in a fantastic location close to Cessnock and the wineries. The 2 person cabin we stayed in was basic but well-appointed, clean and very good value for money. There is also a very well-appointed camp kitchen with salad bowls, platters, tables, comfortable chairs and a big screen TV. Would definitely recommend.

Fijne camping, zwembad en vlakbij de wijngaarden. Wij hebben een halfuurtje gelopen naar een van de wijngaarden in de buurt, onderweg kom je mooi landschap en kangoeroes tegen.
Aardig personeel en alles was schoon.
We were on a caravan site.  All staff were very helpful and the facilities were exceptionally clean.  Parak was central to everywhere we visited in the Hunter Valley.
Great owner in a central location.

Had a great stay here for
4 weeks. Great location to enjoy all the area has to offer. Quiet park even when full, staff friendly and very helpful. Spacious sites. Would recommend 👍
Friendly and helpful staff and perfect location.

This is a great family owned caravan park with all you need for a comfortable and enjoyable stay. The grounds are beautifully kept, there is a terrific camp kitchen with a pizza oven, and a comfortable lounge area to relax in. The owner is very welcoming and helpful. The facilities are all kept clean and tidy. It's close to the wineries and the local tourist activities. Cost wise, it is very good value. I recommend staying here.

Had a lovely stay. Kylie was very helpful and friendly nothing was too much trouble.  The park is close to wineries, golf and other tourist venues, as well as pubs and Cessnock. Very personal service and all facilities were clean and well maintained.

Stayed 2 nights powered site, staff excellent,sites eazy to get into, location very good.
If you are needing a base, this it.
Highly recommended.

Great little campsite. Family owned which was nice rather than the big more expensive company ones. Friendly check in, nice tidy well kept grounds. Clean amenities with a secure pin entry. A bit dated but clean (which I’d rate over modernity any day)
Well located near a pub brewery and we noticed pick ups happening for winery tours from the camp entrance (big tick for future booking from us for that!)
Great social camp kitchen and a pizza oven!
Really liked this campground and will definitely return!
Great little park, some sites are small but I had no problems fitting my 10m truck in, friendly, clean and great location 👍
Close to busy road so some sites are quite noisy

We stayed at this park for a week. So close to all the wineries. Beautiful park, excellent amenities, always clean. Met some lovely fellow caravaners. Thankyou to Kylie and Selina for making our stay so wonderful. You girls are just the best. Will definitely stay here again.

Highly recommend wine country tourist park, the manager's and staff are amazing humans who can't do enough for you. If your looking for a reasonably priced place to stay near the Hunter Valley wineries 🍷 this is the best place to stop. Looking forward to our next visit and the next.

The location of the park is excellent, as it is very close to wineries. The restrooms were extremely clean, although the hot water ran out a bit quickly when taking a shower.

Overall, the camp kitchen, swimming pool, and campsites are very well maintained. I also paid an additional $20 for a late departure fee, which allowed me to enjoy a nice lunch at one of the wineries before saying goodbye.

I should mention that the park is very quiet on weekends, but I'm unsure about weekdays since it is located next to a public school. We will definitely come back!
Such a great park close to everything
Great little park.Very friendly staff.

Wonderful stay on a powered site. Lovely clean amenities, with lots of love and thoughtful detail in every area of the park. We enjoyed the communal firepit and well appointed camp kitchen area. Perfect location for exploring the vineyards close by!!
We had a great week on a powered site. Super friendly service and location to wineries could not be better. Some road noise but the benefits were worth it.

We stayed on a powered site which was perfect for us
Amenities are good everything you need
Staff were friendly and helpful with great knowledge of the area and able to make excellent recommendations for vineyards
Will stay again
Thanks
Good park great camp kitchen and fire pit...
Very friendly staff and extremely clean facilities. There is a school across the road but outside of that it was very quiet.  We really enjoyed our stay and recommend.  Thank you
Exactly what we needed.

This is a nice friendly and quiet park. The facilities were clean and well kept with friendly staff The camp kitchen and fire pit was a extra that I did not expect. Congratulations to this family owned park.
Great location good rooms
Amenities below average given the prestigious region we're visiting.

Stayed on a powered site. The caravan sites are well designed and facilities are very clean. Kylie was very accommodating and friendly. The location is perfect for the vineyards and just across the road from the Valley Brewhouse. The pie shop on the corner does excellent coffee as well! This is our preferred stay when in the Hunter. Will be back!

Excellent park. Everything clean and tidy. Great camp kitchen with giant pizza oven.
Super close to wineries. We were in our caravan.
The reception lady was very friendly and helpful. I will definitely return.

Brilliant stay at Wine Country Tourist Park, the service and care from Kylie and the team you feel like part of the family.  The facilities were clean tidy and welcoming.  Enjoyed meeting fellow campers around the fire pit.  Can’t wait to head back in a few weeks.  Highly recommend..

Kylie was a great host.
Nice little park close to all the Hunter Valley attractions. The only slight negative was the screaming kids at the school next door.

Great little holiday park, very clean so close to the vineyards. Little bakery next door as well.
Definitely be back.
Had a great stay

We had a lovely stay here on our trip to Hunter Valley. Facilities were really clean and the camp kitchen was perfect. Even had a couch and tv to chill in the evening. It was nice and close to lots of wineries too. Would happily stay again!
Loved this park. Great facilities and all amenities and grounds are kept well.  Very friendly and helpfull staff and their assistance was greatly appreciated. Thank you to Kylie and the team.
Lovely clean friendly caravan park.  Close to town and all the attractions.  Walking distance to a pub and pie shop. Definitely will be back.
A great base to visit the wineries in the Hunter. Small family run park so the staff are friendly and helpful. Well worth a visit if you’re in the area.
Small caravan park. Only wish our powered sites was not next to major road as it was very noisy at night. Has nice camp kitchen and pizza oven also we sat and enjoyed the fire pit

We hebben 1 nacht op dit park verbleven met onze camper. We stonden babies het toiletgebouw wat fijn was. Het gebouw is wat gedateerd maar heel zuiver en er staat een mandje net shampoo e.d. voor het geval je dit vergeten zou zijn. Nabij is een bierbrouwerij met een bistro, waar he lekker kunt eten en drinken.
Booked and got a great van site, all staff friendly and helpful, been here before and will be back in future, especially after amenities block is up graded.

Stayed one night at the Wine Country Park on a road trip.
Great central location, easy check in , clean and tidy amenities.
Great caravan park, highly recommended in staying at this gem of a place. clean, tidy facilities. Kylie and her staff went out of their way to make sure that we had a pleasant stay.
Stayed for 2 nights in our caravan - site was great! Proximity to wineries was fantastic, very clean although could do with some updating. Will stay again next time we visit wineries.

I found the small family park, location great, especially being in a motorhome with a pouch.

Just a walk to coffee, meals and other necessities.

Found the reception went out of their way to be accommodating to allow me access to a double slab near the conveniences.

Conveniences although quite old, we’re very very clean and hygienic.

Could not fault the park and happy to revisit at any time.👍

We stayed here recently on a powered caravan site. The staff were excellent, the site was level with a concrete slab adjacent to our caravan. Amenities were clean. The park has sullage for caravans and a dump point. The park is near a busy road during the day but goes quiet before bed. No road trains. This park is close to wineries and local attractions. We will definitely stay here again. A big thankyou to the park owners who obviously care about their park.

Lovely little Caravan Park, great location. Very friendly staff, clean amenities. We had a powered site close to the road and didn't have any issues with road noise at night. Will definitely stay here again.
Great location! Great service! Thank you very much!
Very nice caravan park and very reasonable rates. Facilities were well kept and clean and staff were very friendly. Will happily come back.

Great small family park, very friendly, helpful and good fun.
Clear park layout
Pizza oven and fire pit fantastic with wood supplies and enjoyed the camp kitchen for morning teas and happy hours!
Our caravan club enjoyed the whole time with this park.
Thanks 👍

Great location close to all the vineyards and easy to get to shops in Cessnock. Wonderful facilities and staff. Will visit again.

Be mindful if you are a light sleeper there’s a little bit of road noise and some very aggressive early morning wake up calls from the local birds.

Great little campsite, close to everything, tidy sites.  Facilities are a little old but very clean and functional.
Would stay again for sure.

We stayed at the Wine Country Tourist Park Hunter Valley for a weekend. And what a gem we found! Unfortunately we arrived after dark, but we were immediately greeted by a friendly face, helping us to do the after hours check in, showed us our spot and where all the amenities are. Fantastic location for our van. Very clean kitchen/bathrooms/etc - they even have a pool! 5 stars! Will recommend to everyone! Thanks for a lovely stay Kylie and team.
Great spot close to local brewery and wineries. Great camp kitchen with BBQ, large TV, and fire pit. Amenities were good. Easy access.

Fantastic location great little caravan park central to all the wineries. Good facilities spotlessly clean. Camp kitchen is complete with a large fire pit social area and a wood fired pizza oven too! Only a 600m walk to the local Brewery and Bistro.
Lovely caravan park not too big and not too small. Great location to explore the Hunter Valley wine region.

Great little caravan park close to shopping centres and vineyards. Has a terrific camp kitchen and a fire pit plus they supply the wood quite a bit of traffic noise of a day if you are on that side of the park but doesn't really bother you it quietens down of a night. Will return
This is our go to caravan park,have just had our 3rd stay,best place around heaps of room for our caravan,and very friendly staff,thanks again guys for another awesome stay..😁

This camping site in Hunter Valley is in a great location—close to several wineries and just a short walk from a local pub! The campsite itself is on the smaller side, with space for around four tents.

There’s a shared kitchen that's well equipped and a communal firepit, which is a nice touch. The bathroom facilities are compact, with three showers and three toilets, but they’re kept clean. One downside is the noise from the nearby main road, which can be noticeable at night.

The staff are very friendly and welcoming, which really adds to the experience. A couple of suggestions: the outdoor bathroom light stays on all night and it was right in front of our tent site—this made it a bit hard to sleep. Also, offering a shuttle service to the wineries would be the cherry on top!

Overall, prices are average for a powered tent site at $45 per night. A good spot for a short, wine-filled getaway
This was a great park in a handy location. The facilities were clean. Big easy accessible caravan sites. The internet was the only downside.
Lovely and affordable caravan park close to all the wineries.
Well presented,  large sites, helpful friendly host.
Awesome value for money, pet friendly with clean sites and amenities. Will stay here again if in the area. Would recommend to others

Glad we stayed here.  The location is excellent with the best of Hunter Valley in easy reach. It’s a nice small park so no long walks to amenities, pool or camp kitchen. Amenities are a bit dated but very well kept.
Highly recommend.

What a little gem, at the gateway to the Hunter Valley. We booked a powered slab last minute and were given a super private area. The staff are super friendly and helpful, the amenities are clean and have everything you need, the showers are nice and hot and the best part was how quiet and respectful the park was. A great night sleep! We will be back 🙂
Stayed at the park for 5 nights the staff and team were helpful and friendly. The park is close to the wineries and other attractions. Recommend highly
We stayed in our caravan ,very central to where we had to go .The lady behind the desk was lovely would highly recommend to stay here on your travels

What a superb find.  Not only is the management super friendly and helpful, the caravan park is small but tidy, with wide spaces for your van and older but immaculate amenities, camp kitchen and a pool. Close to  Potters, Peterson and Rydges it is a must stay... plus your doggie friend can join. 5 stars!

I just spent a week at the Wine Country Tourist Park in the Hunter Valley. It couldn't have been a worse week for weather and during the devastating flood emergency in NSW. Our cabin was cozy, warm and clean, very comfortable. We were holidaying with friends who had caravans, and our cabin was perfect for evening get togethers and games. The office staff couldn't have been more helpful, friendly and professional. I can't recommend this park enough and it's location is perfect for enjoying everything the Hunter Valley has to offer. We're looking forward to a return visit in the future.
Very clean and tidy park very welcoming and plenty of amenities lovely camp kitchen with loads of stuff to help you

Stayed here in our caravan for five nights. What a welcoming and friendly place. Great camp kitchen. Amenities were always clean with hot showers. Slab site which was great as it rained non stop. Location was fabulous. Close to wineries, and all tourist attractions. We will definitely be back. Highly recommend. Thanks Gary & Bec
Cabins , affordable, clean , fresh , modern ! Staff friendly ! Will go back !
I absolutely love this park; the staff are wonderful, and it offers great amenities. There is a fantastic camp kitchen with a pizza oven and a fire pit.

We had a few days in the Hunter Valley. As we had our small dog with us, we booked a 'pet friendly' cabin.
The cabin was a bit small, but was absolutely spotless. It had a very comfy bed and for what we needed it was good.
Very friendly staff who were very helpful.
The park was clean and very well maintained.
We would stay here again, and being able to bring your pet, was great.

Great little caravan park, run by family (very friendly). Everything was well maintained, and there were lots of little extra touches like the bathroom  essentials if you forgot yours and camp kitchen sauces, etc, as well to share. Firepit/ pizza oven with wood supplied.
Highly recommended. We were attending a concert in the Hunter Valley & stayed here for 2 nights. Location & price were fantastic.

Popped in for an almost last minute visit. From the outset it was an absolute pleasure with Kylie at reception being the right person for the job! Most welcoming, jovial and helpful.

We had a caravan and our friend a van. I cant comment on the rooms but the spaces for vans were fine with some needing a rest from a bit too much loving as is often the case and becoming more so nowadays with more caravans and travellers post CVD19.

The facilities were clean and well maintained. Even more thought out into the mens toilets/showers with many extraction fans meaning no showering with poo fumes often associated with mixed facilities!

If we come back to the Hunter region..we'll stop there again.

Thank you Kylie and team.

5/5! Super happy with our stay. Nice and friendly caravan park. Our family of 6 stayed in a 2br cabins, it was clean, modern  and cosy. Oven, stove, kettle and a microwave was inside for everyday cooking, but if you planning on preparing a big meal and want to seat comfortably- right next to our cabins was a big, well supplied camp kitchen with BBQ and even pizza oven!
He had an amazing stay!
Kylie was super friendly and helpful. Will be back again definitely, only for longer!
Thank you for your hospitality ❤️
We camped with our Tent and Dog. Staff was friendly and helpful with out requests. Dog friendly camping

Great rooms for the price, great location and very friendly staff. The firepit was such a bonus. Please note that not all rooms are pet friendly. Please check your booking as we booked two rooms and one was not pet friendly. Also if you are looking to cook etc. bring some pots and pans etc. as there isn't much there for cooking.

Great place near the town of Cessnok and close to the grapefruit fields, perfect calm place where you can get all you need for the right price.
We stayed 2 nights with a family of 4 and it was a great experience.

Great Location, close to all the wineries and attractions in the Hunter. Pub over the road was handy. Sites for big rigs was good but note yiu will get some traffic noise being close to a main road. Excellent hosts guided me into my spot as I was a bit inexpeirenced,

Kylie and her team have a very affordable, clean ,comfortable and extremely friendly park. We stayed for 3 months in our caravan and loved it. Great brewery pub across the road, wineries and shops just minutes away.
We stayed in a motorhome. Site was private and spacious.  Amenities were very clean.  Had a great time by the firepit behind the camp kitchen. Staff very friendly and attentive around the park.

What a great place to stay lovely family run park the host Kylie was so helpful and friendly really made you feel welcome.The amenities were spotlessly clean and tidy as well .We would definitely stay at this park again 😊
Ordentlicher Platz, gute Amenities. Zu Fuß zum nächsten Weingut ist schon ein Stück. Mit dem Auto zur Weinprobe zu fahren, macht halt keinen Sinn

A very overdue review. In January we hired our 1st Motor Home and set off to Hunter Valley. This was our fist stop and the staff we so very helpful. They offered assistance in parking and really went above and beyond in helpfulness. Many Thanks
A top little park. Excellent location, friendly and helpful staff and amenities are clean and easy to access. Our second visit and there will be more!

Fabulous caravan park on the edge of the Hunter Valley. Close to wineries, shops and restaurants with the local pub not 10 minutes walk away. Kylie and her staff are friendly and helpful. One of our absolute favourite places to stay.

Lovely welcome . An older site which is obviously being improved all the time . Amenities were clean and I thought them  the best of the older sites we have stayed in over 2 months travel.
Would stay again .

Great family owned park. It was clean & had a fantastic camp kitchen.
Really lovely people, & in a great location. Definitely would come back here.
Thankyou for your friendly hospitality.

We enjoyed our stay once again, the grounds & amenities are kept clean & the pool was welcomed on such a hot weekend! The location was  perfect for our weekend concert in the vines.
Until we meet again, thank you.

I'm very reluctant to give this hidden gem a rating, because I want to ensure I can always nab a site booking! Kylie is a legend, the first weekend I went up she offered to store my camping gear since I'm coming up on public transport. She reminded me to book Easter early and she even gave me the heads up about the Roxette concert! The only fault I must point out was the distinct lack of garden hoses to drink out of for all of the gen Xers who converged for the Roxette/ Boom Crash Opera/Jon Stevens. Shame, Kylie, shame! Love from Heidi xx
Lovely campsite- good facilities in the camp kitchen. Warm showers and very friendly and accommodating staff!

What a nice caravan park ammenities block old but very clean lady at reception very helpfull pool great for a swim camp kitchen spotless wished we could of had a fire in fire pit and wished we could of used pizza oven but I think fire nan still on close to everything and no dramas will go again thankyou

De camping is klein maar zeer schoon. Er is zelfs een klein zwembad. Het is midden gelegen in the hunter valley. Het wijngebied in NSW. De service is van grootte klasse. Meewerkend en meedenkend. Zelfs als je na sluitingstijd komt is het perfect geregeld en ligt alles voor je klaar. Het sanitair is eenvoudig maar zeer schoon, douchen met warm water en wasmachines aanwezig. Evenals een droger!

Gepflegter Campground am Tor zu allen Weingütern. Von hier kann man sich auch direkt zu einer Weingut-Runde abholen lassen. Sehr nett die bunten Vögel, die am Nachmittag sich hier regelmäßig füttern lassen.
Heerlijke en mooie schone camping. Echt een aanrader waneer je in HunterValley bent.

What a wonderful friendly place to stay.
Location excellent to the wineries and to supermarkets.
We had a caravan site clean and close to dump site which was great for us as my husband has back trouble.
We had battery trouble and they couldn't have been more helpful nothing too much trouble.

Perfect spot to relax and discover the region and all the wines. Nice little pool and fully equipped camp kitchen. Toilets and showers bit vintage but definitely clean and comfortable.  Bicycle hire not as shown on website (35aud a day) but via a company nearby (more expensive 70aud a day).

Perfect location for winery tours 😀
Sites are meticulously clean and well organised. Luke & Kayla- kudos 👏
Stayed for one night and it was perfect! Great communal kitchen setup and the bathrooms were well looked after. Would recommend this to anyone coming to explore the hunter valley region.
Nice campground, very friendly and helpful staff, very good camp kitchen. Amenities quite old but absolutely clean. Perfectly situated to explore the Hunter Valley.

Tiny little park with a friendly staff lady and well kept grounds. I stayed in a pet friendly studio room and it was ok except there’s a main road behind you and the room didn’t have a bling on a frosted glass full door. I would stay there again it’s very clean
The staff were super helpful, great location, I'd totally stay again!

This camp was quite central for our purposes. Close to wineries, brewery across the road and easy access to shops when required.  Great service with clean facilities and pool. We were fortunate enough to be there for the airshow which was a great bonus. The only downside was the noise from the road in the early morning.

We stopped for a couple of days at this lovely little caravan park in the Hunter Valley. Arrived on a 42 degree day and the car promptly refused to start as we were half way backing the van into the site. Staff were wonderful and even loaned us their vehicle to finish reversing the car into the site while the NRMA were on the way. All ended well with a battery replacement. We found the place really convenient to the major wineries and attractions, clean and well maintained, and of course the service was wonderful. Highly recommended.
Great location, all spots with electricity, kitchen is very well equipped, also with daily use stuff. The staff was really nice and helpful!

Great managers couldn't do enough for me, all amenities spotless, gem of a pool...plenty of room for my big motorhome...location tops 15 minutes from most places.  Thanks Kylie and Luke.  Will definitely stay again.
Had our own caravan and got a powered site. Staff are great, Clean amenities, all sites and gardens are well maintained.

13 of us camped at Wine Country Tourist Park. The staff were very accomodating and lovely to talk to. The location was convenient as we came here for ‘A Day on The Green’ and it was a 3 minute walk to where the bus was picking us up from. The amenities were fairly clean and right next to where we stayed. The pool was very clean and refreshing. We did however lose a sentimental wedding ring while staying here which was heartbreaking but the staff seemed to genuinely care and keep a lookout for it, also informing us they would call if the ring ever shows up.

The process of booking was a simple call where they also suggested how many sites we would need for our big group and what we were setting up with. We took 5 cars (1 medium sized tent, 6 swags) and a small motor home which we were able to fit on 3 powered  sites and a concrete slab.

Would highly recommend and stay again

Très cher pour 1 bungalow en préfabriqué   situé au bord d une route passante donc très bruyant. Le bungalow était situé le long de la piscine donc pas d intimité..
En plus, nous avons tue 6 cafards durant notre séjour de 2 jours !

We only stayed for 1 night at Wine Country Tourist Park and we wish we could have stayed longer! The team were very friendly and helpful and gave us lots of useful information about what was in the local area. They even helped me phone a taxi company on their phones as my UK phone number wasn’t working. There are lots of wineries and even a brewery close by and the park is in a lovely area.

The facilities were nice and clean and overall it was a really friendly caravan park and we would highly recommend staying here.
really nice place, very friendly, clean :) we will defintely come back!

Disappointing Experience - Would Not Recommend

Our stay at this campsite was unfortunately far from pleasant. While the initial presentation seemed promising with a pool and other advertised amenities, the reality was very different.

Firstly, the cleanliness of the premises was concerning. We found cockroaches scattered in multiple areas, including the bathrooms and the kitchen. This alone was unsettling, but it got worse. To our utter disbelief, there was a deceased rat left in the shared lounge area for an extended period, with no staff addressing it, surrounded by flies for fact.

Additionally, our departure was handled in an unnecessarily harsh and unprofessional manner. We were abruptly asked to leave without clear justification, which left us feeling both confused and disrespected.

Overall, this was a deeply disappointing experience. Cleanliness, professionalism, and basic respect for guests are non-negotiable standards that this campsite, unfortunately, failed to meet. I would advise potential visitors to think twice before booking.
Great park to stay, I have stayed here many times, close town and supermarket, area is clean, owner and manager, kind and friendly. Highly recommended.

I was travelling in 6.5m self contained motor home which fitted nicely on powered site.

I found the amenities clean and the interactions with the owners very pleasant.

A wild storm hit the park whilst I was there and the planning and drainage of the park resulted in little damage.
Sehr nette Dame an der Rezeption. Hat uns freundlich empfangen. Sehr sauber und ruhig. Sehr zu empfehlen.

My wife and I recently stayed three nights at the Wine Country Tourist Park. The location is excellent and the owners and staff were all really great. The facilities were extremely clean and tidy. The owners were extremely accommodating  and we had a small problem with a piece of equipment on our rental RV. The problem was quickly solved with the help of the owner and for that we are very grateful. Thanks for a great stay at a great location.
Stayed in powered camp site during our stay. Clean amenities with one of the better camp kitchens we have come across in our travels. Would recommend

Drain was higher than caravan, I had to drain on grass. Code to enter shower /toilets very annoying. Toilets/showers old need an upgrade but usable. Hand soap units always empty in the toilets. Wifi almost nonexistent.Have been in several caravan parks and I give this a one star.

The caravan park looks ordinary and old, nothing special, owner should add more garden and trees around. One thing that annoys me the most is toilet with a passcode, imagine if iyou have Alzheimer or a little child that really needs to go to the bathroom and forget the passcode. Advertised free internet but no internet most of my stay. Shower and toilet look old . We stayed for 5 days on powersite caravan park and did not like the park at all.
Great place, good location!

We could not fault the Wine Country Tourist Park. The cabin was absolutely spotless, in a perfect position to pool and bbq’s, the surrounding gardens were well maintained and a damaged chair was returned within 5 minutes of notifying the owners. The location is ideal for day trips to wineries and other places of interest. Thank you Kylie for a memorable stay at your Tourist Park. Didn’t realise when I booked that I had already stayed. This will be my go to Park when I visit the Hunter Valley.

We had a wonderful stay at this family owned very cute tourist park. Kylie was very nice and helpful. Clean amenities. The kitchen is well equipped, the pool was refreshing after a long day dicovering the vineyards. I 100% recommend!

What a hidden gem. We didn’t realise this caravan park existed. Staff were  very accommodating & lovely when doing our booking. On arrival staff were friendly and helpful. The grounds were clean, ammenities were a little dated but very clean.  camp kitchen was a nice cool spot to hang out when it rained with plenty of room. Very close to the wineries and other attractions.  A 2 min walk across the road to the Brewery.
Very nice place, good facilities, clean rooms, friendly staff

Had no idea this great little park was here so close to the vineyards! Was awesome to be able to bring our caravan AND our dogs to stay while we attended a wedding at pokolbin. Great friendly service and we met some other happy campers in the pool. Clean amenities, can't fault this cheap clean spot! Will definitely use every time we come to the vineyards.

Stayed 2 nights found that the location is just perfect for exploring the Hunter wine region.  The park is so neat,tidy & very well maintained.  Amenities are dated but very clean,pool is very welcoming on a warm day with an added bonus of an awesome camp kitchen a big well done to all that puts in the effort in keeping things the way it should be.

The location is excellent, being close to supermarkets and the city center, and just a few kilometers away from other attractions in Hunter Valley, making it very convenient. The campsite staff are friendly and helpful with any questions you may have. The site is clean, the BBQ area is tidy, well-lit, and fully equipped. They even have a pizza oven, which is amazing!

The only minor issue is that it’s near the local airport, so you can hear the sound of airplane propellers, but it seems to stop after 10 PM. Also, in the men’s shower area, the sensor light turns off very quickly—twice, it went completely dark while I was in the middle of a shower... haha!

Overall, it was a very enjoyable and happy experience.
Friendly reception staff local knowledge, clean facilities

First time stay with our caravan site was perfect amenities were very clean and the pool was perfect as it was very hot
We will definitely stay there again
We loved the park
Fantastic service and we’ll come back again in winter.

Great location just out of Cessnock and right across from a brewery!
They were all very helpful and the place was very well kept and well stocked kitchen area too!
Amenities were clean and tidy
Great privately operated caravan park in the perfect winery location. At the end of the day it’s the staff that make the difference and I couldn’t speak highly enough of Selina and Co.
stayed 3 nights in our caravan, great little park, amenities are old but were always very clean. Close proximity to all the wineries, overall would highly recommend a stay here.

Location, location etc, perfect spot for touring the Hunter Valley. Park itself is pretty basic , amenities clean but need a revamp. Sites can be tight if neighbours are all set up. Camp kitchen looks good but we didn’t use it. Nice herb garden. Good value for the area

Our stay here was quite good. We used the camp kitchen,  it was well set out and frequented by many. Always enjoy a good camp kitchen.
Green grassy site, yes we were cl8se to the rd and the road noise is to be considered, but we carry earplugs, we used them it was fine.
We had our own bike, an easy cycle into town and only 600mtrs to the brewery.
We'd stay again.
Close to the wineries 🍷 cafe down within walking distance! So quite and green! Awesome facilities!
Lovely little park.

Nice caravan park with pool and camp kitchen. Well located to travel around Hunter valley and enjoy wine tasting.
Only critic I can make is that it is very close to a big noisy road so if you are looking for a quiet place it is not for you. If you are not annoyed with the noise I recommend the place.
Camping propre et bien équipé mais très très bruyant même la nuit car le long du route très passante

We didn't stay in the cabins, but as a caravan-traveller Wine Country Tourist Park was an excellent stay! Ours was a half-way pit stop for an event, though hubby & I were fervently discussing when we can return to sample the local wineries so near to the Park. Kylie was lovely to deal with, & made the late-check in process so easy. The kids were upset to leave, so I suppose we'll have to come back soon!

Basic rooms but clean and tidy
Great camp kitchen area with everything provided

We stayed 2 nights in a caravan campsite.
Lovely staff and a great spot to explore the wineries around.
We hired bike that were ok (require a bit maintenance) but all in all we had a great stay!
Ended up staying just over two weeks - this is a great little park, clean, well maintained and a fantastic location. Everyone is really friendly, that's why we keep coming back!
Very friendly and helpful lady at reception. Good sized sites. Was easy to position my big van.
Saubere, gepflegte Anlage. Amenities sind etwas in die Jahre gekommen aber gepflegt. Leider an einer etwas befahrenen Straße gelegen.
A great little park.  Close to the wineries and friendly staff.  The camp kitchen is well appointed with pizza oven and large fire pit as well.
Sehr nette Anlage, alles sauber, grün und sehr gepflegt! Preis-Leistung ist wirklich top!
The toilets were very clean. Nice little place to stay
a quick get away to the wineries with our caravan, prefect caravan park to explorer the vineyards and still sleep in your own bed no complaints here recommed to anyone

We had a lovely 4 days staying at the wine country tourist park. We had a spacious site by the roadside. There was a bit of road noise but that didn't bother us too much. The park grounds are well maintained and staff are happy and helpful. The best part is how close it is to all the wineries. It really is so well situated to everything.  We had our own bathroom so didn't use the amenities. Thanks for a lovely stay in the Hunter Valley.

Very nice family operated Campsite .
This was our second time here and we Kylie straight away recognised and remembered us.
Very convenient Campers Kitchen with Fire place to sit around in winter . Beautiful atmosphere !
We came in a tent so didn't see the rooms in the cabins. Shower block clean and the entire Park well maintained.
Very close to wineries
Brewery just across the road where you can eat if you don't feel like cooking .
Hope to return soon
Great spot for our caravan stay, large size, clean amenities and reasonable prices. Close to all the usual winery venues, as well as Cessnock for all essentials , food etc
Did exactly what it said on the tin. Friendly receptionist. Super clean room and comfy bed

Dieser familiengeführte Campingplatz hat uns überzeugt! Große Stellplätze und saubere Badezimmer. Die umliegenden Weingüter sind super leicht zu erreichen – perfekt für Weinliebhaber! Man merkt, dass hier mit viel Herzblut gearbeitet wird.

Great location close to many attractions 🍷
Nice management
Pet friendly 🦮👍

Great location
Friendly
Close to the Hunter valley Wineries
Pet friendly
Already booked for next visit
Powered site #21
Stayed here in a little cabin for a wedding at one of the wineries. The place was lovely and cozy, staff were very friendly and our stay was awesome. Will stay here again next visit 🙂

Not as nice/modern as some we have stayed at on our trip but got the job done.  Toilets and showers were few in numbers but never seemed to be overwhelmed with users.  Camp kitchen was a little messy but that’s more on the other campers than the managers of the sites.
Excellent location and really lovely staff! We really enjoyed our 4 night stay 🌞 good clean amenities and awesome camp kitchen! Thanks guys!

Stayed at Wine Country tourist park on the 18th and 19th of September 2024, been here several time and the plac3 never disappoints, good clean amenities, Star are always happy to see you, there close to the Vineyards and everything else very happy to stay there any time of the year

Camped there, our return visit just as friendly and accommodating as the last time we stayed there. Has everything needed and very welcoming well maintained and was great driving distance to everything. It will definitely be our go to when we return to the hunter.
Reception staff were helpful & friendly. Amenities & sites were clean & well maintained.  Site fees were very reasonable, we are very happy with our short stopover.

Inchecken ging soepel, ontvangst was hartelijk en laag drempelig. Gastvrij en bereid te helpen waar kan.
Kleine, gemoedelijke en schone camping. Goed onderhouden. Wij hebben hier 2 nachten gestaan en met veel plezier! Fietsen te huren op de camping.
Prachtige omgeving!
Stayed 2 nights on a large powered site. Will definitely return and recommend this park

Amazing camping and mobile home caravan park. The amenities from the shower block toilets camp kitchen fire pit pizza oven pool and just the general surrounds is amazingly maintained cleaned neat tidy and a delight to stay at. We have returned after a friend stayed 3 years ago and have to say we were just as delighted to return. The hosts are accomodating pleasant and lovely at check in and check out. Nothing is a problem. Easy walking distance to the brewery and pick up and drop off for any hunter valley festivals or winery tours. You won’t be disappointed with a stay here.

Very friendly manager with helpful local information. The cabin was clean and comfortable with most of essentials available. The vanity tap was broken but still working. A little noise from the busy side road. Good location for winery visits and away from the busier shopping areas.
A most enjoyable stay at Wine Country Tourist Park. We'll be back.

We stayed here for 4 days to visit the Hunter Valley. The park is close to many wineries and only a 400 meter walk to Potters Brewery and a cafe in the nursery only 200 meters away.
It is a nice small park with large sites and clean amenities. Amenities are dated BUT are always clean, so nice to see!
Thank you for having us and providing advice on where to go and what to do - we had a great stay and will be back when we visit the Hunter again!!

Great location for your winery holiday experience, so central to everything.  Amazing staff, fire pit during the cold nights was excellent. Nice large motorhome sites. We will be back. Thank you Kylie.

Went to the Hunter to do the winery run. Staff were lovely and very helpful. Booked one bedroom cabin and were upgraded to the two bedroom cabin. Room was very clean and nice. They even let us check in before check in time which helped us out a lot. Really appreciate everything. Will definitely stay again when we return to the Hunter.

Just came back after a few 'cheeky' nights getaway to the Hunter Valley (without the kids!) We usually stay in various hotels/motels/resorts but decided to bring our camper trailer up this time and so chose Wine Country Tourist Park as it was well situated to the wineries we wanted to visit and had great reviews!  Upon arriving, Kylie was very cheerful and friendly and had put us on a great corner site which made manoeuvring in quite straight forward. I was surprised to see how busy it was but it looked like a number of sites were occupied by 'long term' folks working in the area. Compact and easy to use the facilities (showers/bathrooms old but very clean and great water pressure in the showers!) were close by and the overall ambience of the park was really respectful (all gatherings etc all seemed to die down by 9-9:30pm)
You do get some noise off the main road throughout the night and being in a camper trailer (canvas) sound is always a bit more pronounced then in a caravan but overall not an issue! We spent days heading out to wineries and even used an Uber a few times for dinner when we didn't want to drive..all very easy!
Overall we had a great stay and wouldn't hesitate to come back!
Right at the beginning of 🍷 country. Friendly staff.

When I first pulled my camper into this place, my first impressions were that it was pretty ordinary. Sure, it's low cost/low key, gravel service road and sometimes it's a bit of a reach to get power. Overcame that issue when the managers gave me an extension lead free of charge to connect to service.
It wasn't until the second night I began to appreciate this place. Firstly, location. One block from Potters Brewery. You could walk there!
Secondly, pool. Pristine and blue. Mine is green at this time of year as I turn the pool off from mother's day to father's day. Very impressive.
Amenities are spacious and well maintained. Security access.
Now the big ticket items that won me over.
Camp kitchen. Free use of fridge, pizza oven, dining table, lounge, big screen tv, free wood for the FIRE PIT and pizza oven. Even had firelighters and the lighter there! Awesome attention to detail. I did't include pics of the pool in my review but as a pool owner, just take my word for it that it's good.
I checked out the BBQ for gas. Full bottle. Presume it works as everything else does.
I knocked the review down by 1 because I had no wifi the first night.
Great location. Flat concrete pad for every site. Pizza oven, fire pit, tv all in the same location. You could live here!

Great little park. Streets are wide allowing plenty of room to maneuver your van. Facilities are good. Camp kitchen is well equipped but open to the elements. There is a camp firepit beside the kitchen. Good value in the cold. Only minutes away from wineries. Check availability. Travelling with friends and we got the last 2 sites
This is our second stay here and we'd recommend this park.  Close to everything, well maintained, all the amenities you need, and great staff.

Due to delay between leaving old home and new home being ready we needed to stay somewhere. Friend offered her motor home and Nulkaba offered the location. The place to be if you visit the Hunter Valley. We live here we know it’s a super place. The campground is well maintained. Staff are super friendly and keep the place in good order. Not being a seasoned camping travel expert we thought the experience was great. Clean, well appointed good location. Recommend it. They even reminded me that I drove away with the antenna still up in the air. Ta

Pleasant staff who were very obliging when we asked to stay on after the usual 10am checkout time. It's a quiet venue reasonably priced with excellent amenities. Close to the vineyards it is a useful stop on the route up the Hunter Valley.
Lovely staff, clean amenities with a wonderful camp kitchen. Great spot near the vineyards. Thanks for having us!

Spent 3 Nights in My Caravan. Spacious Van sites. I have a Rear Door Van and there was still enough room to Open a 2.5m Rear Awning out.
Amenities are Great. Good Showers,Clean Flushing Toilets. Laundry Has 2 Commercial Size Washers and 2 Commercial Size Dryers.Laundry is Coin Operarated Also a Disabled Toilet in the Laundry. The Inground Pool Looks Great. I hit in Summer. The Camp Kithen is One of the Best I have seen. Sink Washing Station is Excellent just bring your dirty dishes.  Everything to wash ,stack and dry is Provided. The Fridge is Stacked with Sauces,Spreads and Alot of other Delights All Free to use. Every Piece of Cutlery You could ever need. A good Selection of  Cooking Appliances. Also in the Camp Kitchen is A Big TV with A Stack of DVDS & Books.
A Lounge ,2 Dinning Tables. A baby Highchair. At the Rear of the Camp Kitchen is a well built Pizza Oven. And A Fireplace Area. The whole Camp Kithen is Undercover. Great Space.
The Park Aslo Has a Dump Point & Industrial Size Bins.
I Look forward to Returning to this Park. A Really Nice Atmosphere 👌

Campsite was hard to miss - Slightly after a cemetery. Service was ok. The tap for filling our campervan was spoilt, so we had to bother the neighbouring vehicle for abit. Toilet was ok - looked quite old and was a little dark. No other comments.
Kylie the manager is amazing! Very friendly and welcoming. The park is clean, spacious and has everything you need
Very disappointed as they didn't have our wine 🍷.

Great caravan park. Sites are a good size and easy to reverse into with angled parking. Manager and staff are very friendly and helpful. Amenities were very well maintained and a credit to the staffs hard work. 5 mins to supermarket, 1 min to petrol station, brewery across the road and vineyards 10 away.

Sauberer Campingplatz. Die Amenities sind ein wenig in die Jahre gekommen aber trotzdem alles sehr sauber gewesen.
Sogar mit Pool.

Würden definitiv nochmal herkommen. Super Lage wenn man das Hunter Valley besichtigen will.
Great spot. Staff went above and beyond to accommodate our needs

Pretty ornery small caravan park.
Looks great in the pictures on the internet but leaves a bit to be desired when reality sets in. Has a great camp kitchen with free barbecues & everything you need. A small clean pool.
Small, old, cramped, hard to park, only two sitters and three showers in the men's amenities. Clean, but nobody really uses the mop to clean up after themselves.
If they don't update soon, it will fall down!!
A nice caravan park with good amenities, family friendly and lovely staff.

We stayed on a powered site for 2 nights in this caravan park and didn't get much sleep as the road behind us was very busy and noisy.
The amenities were very clean but could do with an update, it was a nice stay.

Nice clean caravan park, friendly staff and well kept amenities. A bit lacking in kitchen facilities (eg one sink only) so be prepared to wait if it's busy. Good as a base to get out & explore the region but not somewhere you'd want to hang out for the day - not much shade and a noisy location next to a major road on the outskirts of Cessnock.

Ottimo camping in una bella regione che purtroppo abbiamo avuto modo di vedere velocemente le piazzole sono ampie e pulite come pure i servizi igienici e l’area cucina a comune abbiamo anche approfittato del forno a legna per fare la pizza 😃
Quiet small caravan park with a great camp kitchen and facilities.. close to the vineyards and golf. Highly recommend

This caravan park has great size site for vans and they are very clearly set out. The amenities are very clean, but they are needing a little bit of TLC or an upgrade. It's only a  short 4min walk to the local pub for dinner and a cold beer after all of the days wine 🍷 tasting and the morning it a very short walk to the garden nursery for the morning coffee.
Nice older style park, a little noisy from the road. Friendly staff, well located near a hotel.

We camped in this lovely caravan park. Kylie was extremely friendly and the whole park had that vibe! From the gardens to the camp kitchen it had everything you needed. Facilities were clean. Awesome location to access the hunter Valley wine region. Love it!

Lovely , green camp-site. Quiet, friendly service, great amenities. The camp kitchen was excellent and provided a comfortable, welcoming atmosphere. Was a nice touch to have some toiletries and other bathroom items available foe guests. Highly recommend
Great little caravan park. Close to vineyards, cheerful helpful staff and very clean amenities.  Fantastic place to stay while visiting the Hunter Valley.

We stayed in a smaller cabin.  Low cost,  happy with that.   Close to Cessnock, that's useful for access to shopping centres, hotels, etc.  But I recommend the larger cabins even for couples.  Happy with the kitchenette  but the website photos do not show how our cabin's width means there is only about 300mm (1 foot) between the end of the bed and the cabin wall, so you need to squeeze past it sideways to get to the bathroom.  The bathroom is about 800mm longer than a typical separate toilet room in a house.  That fits the shower and a tiny basin, no room to put anything at the basin.  We were instructed to leave the bathroom window open to improve ventilation.  There is a tiny extractor fan that we were told was going to be replaced with a larger  more effective unit.

Absolutely recommend staying here if you looking for somewhere to stay to tour the wineries.
Staff are great.
It is in a great location to get to the wineries and just around the corner from Cessnock if you need anything from the bigger stores (Woolies, Coles, Aldis, Big W, BCF etc)

The sites were very large and never felt like you were crowded in, even during the July school holidays.

The amenities are some of the cleanest I have seen in parks.
The camp kitchen is great. Well stocked if you need cutlery or dishes. Has a little lounge area with TV and DVD for relaxing and two large tables.
Has a very nice communal fire to enjoy after a long day of wine tasting.

Will definitely be back
Lovely park small but close to Cessnock a bonus

Beautiful caravan park with an amazing Camp kitchen area.

The staff are wonderful and so incredibly helpful. Thank you for getting us in so quick.

I would like to say the staff here are the most beautiful people I have ever met at a caravan park. They went above and beyond to make sure my son was looked after. We had to keep extending his stay while we waited for a spot in Denman and they were so understanding. Thank you so very much again. You guys rock.

We recommend this place to everyone. 5++++++
It was very good

Staff were very friendly and helpful.  Amenities were clean.  Location was great for easy access to what the Hunter Valley has to offer.  We found it very central for what we wanted and we enjoyed our stay very much
Friendly staff. Fantastic camp kitchen. Old park but homely feeling. Will come again.
